prompt.content:
Calculate the total enterprise value (TEV) using the terminal value – growth in perpetuity approach for S&P Global (consolidated entity) under the following assumptions:
•	Extend the DCF model to a 6‑year forecast by projecting Year 2031 using the same assumptions and operating drivers applied in the prior forecast years.
•	Increase the assumed debt balance to 30,000.
•	Apply the mid-year convention
•	Set the risk‑free rate equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025.

Present the result in USD millions, rounded to the nearest dollar.

rubrics.name: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is... (ver_553b7d86f06a4604862c33ea4b6bc197)

messages.content: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $177,861 million (acceptable range $176,082 to $179,640).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $177,861 million
